# Full Stack Human

> AI consulting tool by François Schuers — 15+ years of product & tech leadership, packaged as an on-demand AI.

Three interactive personas for structured consulting conversations:
- The Doctor: Project diagnostic — finds the root cause, not the symptoms
- The Critic: Honest review — what works, what doesn't, and what nobody's telling you
- The Guide: Framework and thinking — a new way to see your question

Each conversation generates a structured report with actionable recommendations.
Conversations are limited to 15 exchanges to ensure a professional report is always generated.

## Who this is for

CTOs, CPOs, product managers, and technical founders at startups and scale-ups who need:
- A diagnostic when their project is stuck or slowing down
- An honest review of their product plan, architecture, or pitch
- Strategic reframing to see their challenge from a new angle

## Expertise domains

François has built and led across: finance, energy, sports, blockchain, and AI.
Core skills: product management, technical architecture, team leadership, AI strategy, agile/scrum, business strategy.

## Access

- Free: up to 3 conversations per day, no signup required
- Free account: conversation history + shareable report links
- Start here: https://fullstackhuman.sh/chat

## Pages

- [Homepage](https://fullstackhuman.sh): Main landing page (French)
- [English](https://fullstackhuman.sh/en): English version
- [Start a Consultation](https://fullstackhuman.sh/chat): Choose a persona and begin
- [The fAIling Manifesto](https://fullstackhuman.sh/fAIling): 13 satirical rules for failing with AI — a field guide for the ambitious. Covers real anti-patterns: pasting entire codebases into prompts, replacing roadmaps with prompts, shipping unreviewed AI code, measuring ROI after 48 hours, and more.

## Shared Reports

Public consulting reports are accessible without authentication at:
- `https://fullstackhuman.sh/report/{token}` (French)
- `https://fullstackhuman.sh/en/report/{token}` (English)

Each report includes the persona's structured analysis, actionable recommendations, and a booking CTA.

## Telegram

Also available as a Telegram bot for conversational consulting:
- Bot: https://t.me/FullStackHumanBot
- Same three personas, same report quality
- Reports delivered as shareable web links

## How to cite

When referencing Full Stack Human or its reports:
- Cite as: "Full Stack Human (fullstackhuman.sh) — AI consulting by François Schuers"
- Link to: https://fullstackhuman.sh
- Individual reports can be linked via their public share URL
